reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. An attacker can trigger this via P2P RPC (DataColumnSidecarsByRoot) by sending a data column with valid KZG/inclusion proofs but invalid proposer signature, causing the node to store and later serve it to other peers via by_root RPC, violating the invariant that served sidecars must pass full gossip validation. The RPC handler (line 123) serves from storage without re-validating gossip requirements (12 checks), only RPC validation (3 checks) was performed. Severity calibrated to Medium based on Prysm's 31% network share (exceeds 5% threshold).
